s.$description: 13px font size used as default font size for body

m.$description: 14px font size used as default font for buttons

xm.$description: 16px font size used as default size of headings

xxm.$description: 18px font size used as a bigger font size for some headings

l.$description: 20px font size used as the font size of the top headings on app

xl.$description: 24px font size used as a bigger font size for page level headings on web

xxl.$description: 32px font size used as a bigger font size for headings in all apps

xxxl.$description: 35px font size used as the top heading in documentation pages
